scenario: Dashboard parses totalDuration value from assessment as duration
expected: Interpret single minute values and HH:MM/HH:MM:SS correctly
actual_or_risk: Single-value durations were treated as hours (e.g., '45' => 45 hours), causing wrong schedule/remaining time and wrong live/locked transitions
root_cause: parseAssessmentDurationMs used HH-first regex and converted first group as hours
notes: Updated parser to support numeric minutes and HH:MM/HH:MM:SS via shared seconds parser

scenario: Control page parses proctored/online durations for timer and split sections
expected: Duration parsing should produce consistent minutes across total/mcq/descriptive fields
actual_or_risk: Integer values were previously interpreted as hours, causing incorrect timers and extension windows
root_cause: parseDurationMinutes used /^([0-9]+)(?::([0-9]{2}))?$/ and treated first field as hours
notes: Updated parseDurationMinutes to support numeric minutes, HH:MM and HH:MM:SS

scenario: Resume & Extend disabled during final 5 minutes
expected: Policy for final 5 minutes should allow emergency actions if intended
actual_or_risk: Buttons and class reset currently disabled whenever schedule is in final 5 minutes
root_cause: controlsDisabled includes isFinalFiveMinutes and is applied to row action + class reset button
notes: Confirm if this rule is intentional; if not, scope it only to non-emergency actions

expected: All exam pages should interpret duration formats consistently
actual_or_risk: Dashboard and exam controls accepted values differently from proctored parser
notes: Dashboard and exam-controls parsers now align with proctored style; consider adding shared utility later

expected: Violation card action state should match expected click/disable behavior
actual_or_risk: Violation rows can still render enabled action before click then get blocked in handler
root_cause: UI uses isHardLocked for disabled; lock enforcement is done in onClick handler via isLocked
notes: Validate if violation rows should be visually disabled when not requestable yet

expected: Status strings should be stable for filtering/reporting
actual_or_risk: Composite label may break token-based filters downstream
root_cause: `getOverallStatusLabel` returns fixed `'Completed,Violation'` string for one terminal state
notes: Normalize status map if any filter/dashboard consumes split tokens

scenario: Split hybrid section transition and extension overlap
expected: Sequence 2 should start only after sequence 1 completed (plus extension)
actual_or_risk: Current logic should not show in-progress for both sections or allow extension mis-scope
root_cause: Section extension and completion logic are separate paths and may need broader integration tests
status: No single-sequence transition contract test exists; edge flow relies on computed cumulative minute windows
files: Add test coverage for split transition at boundaries and section-scoped extension window
